# Budget Limousine (llms.txt)
# Machine-readable summary for AI systems. Human site: https://www.limoservice-nj.com/

name: Budget Limousine
tagline: A Ride With Class
description: >
  Luxury chauffeur and private car service based in New Jersey. Airport transfers,
  corporate executive transport, special events, hourly as-directed service, and
  regional travel across NJ plus surrounding states (NY, PA, CT, DE).

contact:
  phone: "+1-973-737-7000"
  email: Info@budgetlimonj.com

coverage:
  primary: "State of New Jersey (all regions)"
  extended: "New York, Pennsylvania, Connecticut, Delaware (regional trips as booked)"

airports_typical: ["EWR Newark", "JFK", "LGA LaGuardia", "TEB Teterboro"]

fleet_classes:
  - name: "Standard"
    example_vehicle: "Lincoln Nautilus"
  - name: "Comfort"
    example_vehicle: "Lincoln Aviator"
  - name: "Premium"
    example_vehicles: ["Cadillac Escalade", "Chevrolet Suburban", "GMC Yukon XL"]

booking:
  url_path: "/"
  flow: ["Home booking form", "/select-vehicle", "/trip-details", "/confirmation"]

policies:
  privacy: "/privacy-policy"
  cookies: "/cookie-policy"
  terms: "/terms"

service_slugs_on_home:
  - airport-transfer
  - city-tours
  - corporate-travel
  - special-events
  - hourly-hire
